metadata.command:
cat ~/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('=== 当前配置 ===')
print(f'subtaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"subtaskTimeout\"]/3600000:.0f}小时')
print(f'mainTaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"mainTaskTimeout\"]/3600000:.0f}小时')
print(f'stalledTask通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"stalledTask\"]}')
print(f'subtaskTimeout通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"subtaskTimeout\"]}')
print(f'target: {d[\"notification\"][\"target\"]}')
echo "=== running 目录 ===" && ls -la ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/
echo "=== 告警记录 ===" && cat ~/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/state/alert-records.json
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "20:39:58" --no-pager | grep -E "AlertManager.*发送|告警命令" | wc -l
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "20:39:58" --no-pager | grep -E "AlertManager.*发送|告警命令" | tail -5

echo "=== 官方推荐 vs 当前配置对比 ===" && \
echo "" && \
echo "【官方推荐配置】" && \
cat << 'EOF'
[Service]
Environment=OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1
Environment=NODE_COMPILE_CACHE=/var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache
Restart=always
RestartSec=2
TimeoutStartSec=90
EOF

echo "" && \
echo "【当前配置】" && \
cat /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service

echo "" && \
echo "=== 验证 openclaw gateway 命令 ===" && \
/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/openclaw gateway --help 2>&1 | head -15

echo "=== 应用官方推荐优化 ===" && \

# 创建编译缓存目录
mkdir -p /var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache

# 更新 service 文件
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/.openclaw
ExecStart=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/openclaw gateway
Restart=always
RestartSec=2
TimeoutStartSec=90
LimitNOFILE=65536

# 环境变量
Environment="PATH=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin:/root/.local/share/pnpm:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
Environment="NODE_ENV=production"
Environment="HOME=/root"
Environment="OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1"
Environment="NODE_COMPILE_CACHE=/var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache"

# 启动前检查权限
ExecStartPre=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/bootstrap.sh

# 停止前保存状态
ExecStopPost=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/maintenance.sh backup-config

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

echo "✓ 已更新 service 文件（应用官方推荐配置）"

# 重载配置
systemctl daemon-reload

echo "" && \
echo "=== 最终配置对比 ===" && \
echo "✅ RestartSec: 10 → 2" && \
echo "✅ TimeoutStartSec: 无 → 90" && \
echo "✅ OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN: 无 → 1" && \
echo "✅ NODE_COMPILE_CACHE: 无 → /var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache"

echo "" && \
echo "=== 验证配置 ===" && \
systemctl cat openclaw-gateway | grep -E "ExecStart|Restart|Timeout|Environment" | head -15
ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway

echo "=== 测试 systemd 管理命令 ===" && \

echo "1. 测试查看状态：" && \
systemctl status openclaw-gateway --no-pager | head -15

echo "" && \
echo "2. 测试启动服务（注意：会中断当前 Gateway）：" && \
echo "⚠️ 当前 Gateway 进程：" && \
ps aux | grep "openclaw-gateway" | grep -v grep | head -2

echo "" && \
echo "3. 测试查看日志：" && \
journalctl -u openclaw-gateway -n 10 --no-pager | tail -15

echo "" && \
echo "4. 验证配置文件：" && \
systemctl cat openclaw-gateway | grep "ExecStart="

echo "=== 检查 openclaw 脚本内容 ===" && \
cat /root/.local/share/pnpm/openclaw

echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查 node 的绝对路径 ===" && \
which node
readlink -f $(which node)

echo "" && \
echo "=== 检查 openclaw 实际入口 ===" && \
cat /root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/openclaw | head -20

echo "=== 修复方案：直接使用 node 运行 openclaw ===" && \

# 找到 openclaw.mjs 的实际路径
OPENCLAW_MJS=$(find /root/.local/share/pnpm/global -name "openclaw.mjs" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)

echo "openclaw.mjs 路径: $OPENCLAW_MJS"

# 更新 systemd service 文件
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/.openclaw

# 直接使用 node 运行 openclaw.mjs
ExecStart=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/node \
  /root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules/openclaw/openclaw.mjs \
  gateway

Restart=always
RestartSec=2
TimeoutStartSec=90
LimitNOFILE=65536

# 环境变量
Environment="NODE_ENV=production"
Environment="HOME=/root"
Environment="OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1"
Environment="NODE_COMPILE_CACHE=/var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache"
Environment="NODE_PATH=/root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules/openclaw/node_modules:/root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules:/root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/node_modules"

# 启动前检查权限
ExecStartPre=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/bootstrap.sh

# 停止前保存状态
ExecStopPost=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/maintenance.sh backup-config

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

echo "✓ 已更新 service 文件（直接使用 node 运行）"

# 重载配置
systemctl daemon-reload

echo "" && \
echo "=== 测试启动（会中断当前会话 5-10 秒）===" && \
echo "⚠️ 警告：即将重启 Gateway，当前会话会短暂中断"
echo ""
echo "是否继续测试？如果不测试，下次系统重启时会自动生效。"

echo "=== 检查 openclaw 版本 ===" && \
echo "当前全局安装的版本：" && \
pnpm list -g --depth=0 | grep openclaw

echo "" && \
echo "所有 openclaw.mjs 文件：" && \
find /root/.local/share/pnpm/global -name "openclaw.mjs" -type f 2>/dev/null

echo "" && \
echo "当前 PATH 中的 openclaw 版本：" && \
openclaw --version

echo "" && \
echo "正确的 openclaw.mjs 路径应该是：" && \
ls -la /root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24*/node_modules/openclaw/openclaw.mjs 2>/dev/null
which gh && gh --version
test -f ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/tavily-search/.env && cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/tavily-search/.env | grep -E "TAVILY_API_KEY=" || echo "未找到 Tavily 配置文件"
test -f ~/.config/gemini/config.json && echo "Gemini 配置文件存在" || echo "未找到 Gemini 配置文件"

echo "=== 更新为正确的 3.24 版本路径 ===" && \

cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/.openclaw

# 直接使用 node 运行 openclaw.mjs (3.24 版本)
ExecStart=/root/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/node \
  /root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules/openclaw/openclaw.mjs \
  gateway

Restart=always
RestartSec=2
TimeoutStartSec=90
LimitNOFILE=65536

# 环境变量
Environment="NODE_ENV=production"
Environment="HOME=/root"
Environment="OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1"
Environment="NODE_COMPILE_CACHE=/var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache"
Environment="NODE_PATH=/root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.24_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules/openclaw/node_modules:/root/.local/share/pnpm/global/5/.pnpm/node_modules"

# 启动前检查权限
ExecStartPre=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/bootstrap.sh

# 停止前保存状态
ExecStopPost=/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/scripts/maintenance.sh backup-config

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

echo "✓ 已更新 service 文件（使用 3.24 版本）"

# 重载配置
systemctl daemon-reload

echo "" && \
echo "=== 验证配置 ===" && \
systemctl cat openclaw-gateway | grep "ExecStart="

echo "" && \
echo "=== 当前状态 ===" && \
echo "✅ systemd 配置已更新" && \
echo "✅ 当前 Gateway 运行中（命令行启动）" && \
echo "✅ 配置将在下次系统重启或手动重启时生效" && \
echo "" && \
echo "⚠️  是否现在测试重启？（会中断当前会话 5-10 秒）"
which gemini || echo "Gemini CLI 未安装"

cat ~/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('当前配置:')
print(f'  stalledRunningThreshold: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"stalledRunningThreshold\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  stalledPendingThreshold: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"stalledPendingThreshold\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  mainTaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"mainTaskTimeout\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  subtaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"subtaskTimeout\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  stalledTask通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"stalledTask\"]}')
print(f'  subtaskTimeout通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"subtaskTimeout\"]}')
print(f'  taskChainTimeout通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"taskChainTimeout\"]}')
"
python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json')); print('✅ JSON格式正确')"

cat ~/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('已回退配置:')
print(f'  stalledRunningThreshold: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"stalledRunningThreshold\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  stalledPendingThreshold: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"stalledPendingThreshold\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  mainTaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"mainTaskTimeout\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  subtaskTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"subtaskTimeout\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  taskChainTimeout: {d[\"monitoring\"][\"taskChainTimeout\"]/60000:.0f}分钟')
print(f'  stalledTask通知: {d[\"notification\"][\"types\"][\"stalledTask\"]}')
"
python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/config.json')); print('✅ JSON格式正确')"
grep -n "## Lessons Learned" ~/.openclaw/workspace/MEMORY.md
wc -l ~/.openclaw/workspace/MEMORY.md && echo "---" && head -20 ~/.openclaw/workspace/MEMORY.md

ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat ~/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/state/state.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'运行中任务: {len([t for t in d.get(\"tasks\",[]) if t.get(\"status\")==\"running\"])}个')"

python3 -c "
import json
with open('/root/.openclaw/extensions/task-monitor/state/state.json', 'r') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
    
running = [t for t in d.get('tasks', []) if t.get('status') == 'running']
print(f'运行中任务: {len(running)}个')
for t in running[:5]:
    print(f'  - {t.get(\"id\")}: started {t.get(\"startTime\")}')
"
ls -la ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/tasks/running/
systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway && sleep 3 && systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway && echo "✅ Gateway 已重启"

echo "=== 开始 systemd 启动测试 ===" && \

echo "1. 停止当前 Gateway 进程..." && \
pkill -f "openclaw-gateway" && sleep 2 && \
echo "✓ 已停止"

echo "" && \
echo "2. 通过 systemd 启动 Gateway..." && \
systemctl start openclaw-gateway && \
sleep 5 && \
echo "✓ 已启动"

echo "" && \
echo "3. 检查服务状态..." && \
systemctl status openclaw-gateway --no-pager | head -20

echo "" && \
echo "4. 检查 Gateway 健康..." && \
curl -s http://localhost:26368/health

echo "" && \
echo "5. 检查进程..." && \
ps aux | grep "openclaw-gateway" | grep -v grep | head -2

#!/bin/bash
# assertion-runner.sh - 执行 skill assertions 并记录结果

set -euo pipefail

EVALS_DIR="/root/.openclaw/workspace/memory/evals"

if [ $# -lt 1 ]; then
    echo "用法: $0 <skill_id> [--dry-run]"
    exit 1
fi

SKILL_ID="$1"
DRY_RUN="${2:-}"
EVAL_FILE="$EVALS_DIR/$SKILL_ID/eval.json"

if [ ! -f "$EVAL_FILE" ]; then
    echo "[ERROR] 未找到 $SKILL_ID 的 eval.json"
    exit 1
fi

echo "[INFO] 执行 $SKILL_ID 的 assertions..."

# 读取 assertions 数量
ASSERTION_COUNT=$(jq '.assertions | length' "$EVAL_FILE")
echo "[INFO] Assertions 数量: $ASSERTION_COUNT"

# 显示每个 assertion
jq -r '.assertions[] | "[\(.id)] \(.description)"' "$EVAL_FILE"

# 如果不是 dry-run，记录结果
if [ "$DRY_RUN" != "--dry-run" ]; then
    RUN_ID="run_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
    TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    
    # 创建新的 run 记录
    RUN_RECORD=$(jq -n \
        --arg run_id "$RUN_ID" \
        --arg timestamp "$TIMESTAMP" \
        '{
            run_id: $run_id,
            timestamp: $timestamp,
            pass_rate: 0,
            pass_count: 0,
            fail_count: 0,
            failed_assertions: [],
            failure_notes: "Initial run - assertions not yet implemented"
        }')
    
    # 追加到 run_history
    TMP_FILE=$(mktemp)
    jq ".run_history += [$RUN_RECORD]" "$EVAL_FILE" > "$TMP_FILE" && mv "$TMP_FILE" "$EVAL_FILE"
    
    echo "[SUCCESS] 已记录 run: $RUN_ID"
fi

echo "[INFO] 执行完成"
ENDOFSCRIPT
